metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for infrastructure, monitoring, and DevOps workflows

plugins.name: datadog
plugins.description: Datadog monitoring workflows: dashboard creation, log search and analysis, APM trace investigation, metric discovery, and interactive setup

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub workflows: feature development with branch/commit/PR flow, addressing PR review comments, issue and project board management (Epics, sub-issues, triage), release management with Release Drafter (setup, upgrade, and publishing), actionlint CI for workflow linting, and interactive setup for GitHub MCP server and gh CLI.

plugins.name: rails
plugins.description: Ruby on Rails development workflows: debugging and performance profiling, test scaffolding with RSpec and FactoryBot, refactoring patterns for service objects and concerns, and guided version upgrades

plugins.name: terraform
plugins.description: Project-agnostic Terraform operations: plan with safety categorization, apply with confirmation gates and targeted apply, drift detection and resolution.

plugins.name: spacelift
plugins.description: Spacelift CI/CD workflows for Terraform: stack management, run inspection with log analysis, failure debugging, local previews, dependency tracking, and GraphQL schema exploration.
